name: db-query-tool
description: MCP tool db.query: Raw SQL execution for power users/debugging. Params: { sql: string, params?: any[] }. Executes via BunSqlExecutor using active connection. Returns { ok: true, rows: any[], rowCount: number }.
rationale: REQ-10 mcp-database-tools. Enables ad-hoc SQL execution for debugging and advanced use cases.
